changelog: 弹幕连接计划显式返回 User-Agent 请求头，IRC WebSocket 握手责任收敛到插件侧
1.0.32：弹幕协议迁移到插件驱动，Twitch IRC WebSocket 握手、PING/PONG 与 PRIVMSG 解析改为 plugin_js_v1
Align Twitch playback closer to Streamlink by preferring embed playerType first and falling back to site on retry
Switch Twitch usher playback URLs to the v2 channel endpoint and add Streamlink-style platform and random p query params
Prefer platform_cookie when fetching Twitch playback GQL tokens so playback uses the logged-in token path instead of anonymous ad-prone tokens
Add bounded Twitch playback retries and switch the second attempt to embed playerType when the site token path stalls
Remove the Auto playback item and return parsed quality variants in descending bitrate order by default
Make Twitch playback headers more conservative by returning User-Agent inside the final quality headers, matching the older working playback path
Trim Worker and Helix requests down to minimal required headers to avoid host-side timeouts caused by browser-style headers on the official API path
Stop sending Referer, Origin, and default browser User-Agent on Twitch token server and Helix requests
Reduce getCategories to a single Helix games top request so the directory entry no longer waits on multi-page category fetches
Use stale cached Twitch categories when Helix category refresh fails instead of timing out the category page
Remove the Helix preflight from getPlayback so entering a room no longer depends on extra Worker and Helix requests before fetching playback
Reduce Twitch playback startup to the actual playback token and usher playlist chain
Hardcode the Twitch Worker token endpoint into the plugin so Helix auth no longer depends on host runtime config
Remove the Twitch web GQL fallback for categories, rooms, search, detail, live state, and share resolve
Run Twitch browsing data entirely through the server-backed official API path while keeping playback on the existing playback token chain
Add official Twitch API mode driven by a runtime tokenServerURL so the plugin can fetch app tokens from a server without embedding secrets
Use Helix games top, streams, search channels, users, and streams by user when official server-backed auth is configured
Replace Twitch room cursor paging with a first-page prefetch cache so category and all-room lists stop failing on integrity-challenged after cursors
Slice cached room lists locally and return empty pages after the prefetched Twitch room window is exhausted
Stop Twitch category loading after the first games page to avoid second-page integrity challenges on getCategories
Avoid Host platform_cookie on Twitch GQL and default public queries to anonymous requests to bypass integrity failures
Only attach Twitch Cookie and OAuth headers when the host explicitly passes raw cookie data to the plugin
Rewrite Twitch as a user-cookie plugin around Twitch website GQL instead of Helix
Load categories from Twitch games GQL and room lists from streams and game.streams cursors
Keep playback on Twitch GQL plus usher HLS while reusing cookieInject auth-token and unique_id headers
Use searchSuggestions and user profile GQL for search, room detail, live state, and share resolve
